tasks.name: Create settings page component
tasks.prompt:
Read the current codebase first -- especially src/components/ and src/routes/.

Plan first, show me the plan before implementing.

Create a settings page with:
- Theme toggle (light/dark)
- Language selector
- Save button that persists to local storage
- Add a route and nav link

Run tests after.
Update CLAUDE.md with any architectural decisions.

tasks.name: Add tests for settings page
tasks.prompt:
Read the current codebase first -- especially the settings page component created in the previous task.

Write tests covering:
- Theme toggle switches between light and dark
- Language selector updates the displayed language
- Settings persist across page reloads

Run tests after.
